title: Senior devs flee Big Tech’s hidden friction
meta_description: Cut API latency 57% and MTTR 82% with Redis cache wrapper — connection pools, stampede locks, Prometheus metrics and the real reasons senior devs leave big tech
prewritten_tweet:
Most senior engineers don’t leave big tech for money.

They leave because every deploy feels like stepping on landmines.
